reason: Remediation requires verifying the OS version and potentially performing a major OS upgrade to a supported RHEL release. This operation can impact many services, may require a reboot, and carries a risk of losing SSH/console access if not carefully planned. It is beyond simple package install or configuration change, thus human oversight is needed.
estimated_impact: reboot required; Unsupported OS version may lack security patches; OS upgrade can break dependent applications; Potential loss of remote access during upgrade
